import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});// ── Master data ──────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getTrucks=()=>api.get('/trucks').then(r=>r.data);export const getSources=()=>api.get('/sources').then(r=>r.data);export const getCustomers=()=>api.get('/customers').then(r=>r.data);export const getBackloads=()=>api.get('/backloads').then(r=>r.data);// ── Distance ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getDistance=(origin_lat,origin_lng,dest_lat,dest_lng)=>api.get('/distance',{params:{origin_lat,origin_lng,dest_lat,dest_lng}}).then(r=>r.data);// ── Trips ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getTrips=function(){let filters=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/trips',{params:filters}).then(r=>r.data);};export const getTrip=id=>api.get("/trips/".concat(id)).then(r=>r.data);export const createTrip=data=>api.post('/trips',data).then(r=>r.data);export const updateTrip=(id,data)=>api.patch("/trips/".concat(id),data).then(r=>r.data);export const verifyTrip=id=>api.patch("/trips/".concat(id,"/verify")).then(r=>r.data);export const getExportUrl=function(){let filters=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const params=new URLSearchParams(filters).toString();return"/api/trips/export/excel".concat(params?'?'+params:'');};
